overview.description: The Yields for You Income Strategy A ETF (YFYA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds seeking total return consistent with the preservation of capital. The fund uses quantitative measurements to invest in a wide range of fixed income and equity securities, including foreign issuers. YFYA was launched on Jan 31, 2025 and is issued by Teucrium.
